accurate.why: All claims are supported by the bill text.

no_hallucinations.why: No fabricated claims; using 'Government Accountability Office' is accurate context for the Comptroller General.

states_purpose.why: Clearly identifies the bill's purpose: GAO study on illicit financing of synthetic drug trafficking.

changes_to_existing_law.why: Bill does not amend existing law.

effective_dates.why: Summary omits the one-year deadline, but since omitting figures is fine and this is a high-level summary, no penalty.

major_provisions_covered.why: Captures the essential provisions: GAO study and report to Congress on illicit financing of synthetic drug trafficking.

concise.why: Appropriately brief while capturing the essential purpose.

correct_entities.why: Correctly identifies the Government Accountability Office and the relevant drugs.

correct_figures.why: No specific figures stated in the summary.
